2329110.name: Moonchild
2329110.description:
Moonchild is a turn-based RPG set in 2000s America, with a strong emphasis on strategizing and combining abilities and passive buffs.

In the year 200X, trouble is brewing- the Moon is on a collision course with Earth, and only three kids and a teenager can stop it!

Thus begins the epic quest of Max, Sophie, Thomas, and Diva (don't ask her real name) as they try to stop total catastrophe in Frankland, USA!

Oh, and this kid named Benedict is trying to stop them. Don't pay any attention to him, he's a real jerk.

FEATURES:

-Over 170 abilities and passive buffs to play around with. Try to make the most busted strategies you can, and send the enemies back to space!

-Nightmarish dream sequences. The Moon is always watching...

-Expertly composed original soundtrack featuring only stock MIDI instruments! (mostly.)

-Immensely detailed environments filled with sight gags and flavor text galore! Frankland, USA is a fun place!

-Plenty of pop culture references and surreal humor!

-You can beat up the incarnation of every childhood bully you've ever had! UNLEASH YOUR INNER RAGE!!

-Adorable childhood antics wrapped around heartfelt emotion!

-Created mostly by one guy.
2329110.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
